landing.hero_title: Fast Meter Invoicing, Directly to Tenants via LINE
landing.hero_desc: No more paper meters, calculation errors, or high transfer fees. Generate PromptPay QRs sent directly to LINE OA with automated P.N.D. 90/94 tax reports all in one place.

test_connection.title: Supabase Connection Diagnostics
test_connection.subtitle: This page helps you verify the connection between the HorSet application and your local or cloud Supabase database.
test_connection.testing: Sending request to verify database connection...
test_connection.sql_advice: 💡 Recommendation: If database connection is successful but tables cannot be loaded, you might not have run the SQL script in your Supabase SQL Editor. Follow the instructions below.
test_connection.step1_desc: If you don't have a project yet, go to Supabase.com, sign up, and create a new project.
test_connection.step2_desc: Go to your Supabase project 👉 Settings > API, copy the keys, and edit the .env file in your root folder:
test_connection.step3_desc: Go to Supabase 👉 SQL Editor, select "New query", paste the entire contents of schema.sql, and click "Run" to set up tables, RLS policies, and triggers.
test_connection.step4_desc: Once the above steps are completed, click "Retest" above to verify the database connection is 100% operational.
